General.Name: TMK Energy Ltd
General.Description: TMK Energy Limited engages in the exploration and appraisal of coal seam Mongolia. Its flagship asset is the Gurvantes XXXV Coal Seam Gas project covering an area of 8,400 square kilometers located in the South Gobi Desert, Mongolia. The company was formerly known as Tamaska Oil and Gas Limited and changed its name to TMK Energy Limited in February 2022. TMK Energy Limited was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in West Perth, Australia.
General.Address: 1202 Hay Street, West Perth, WA, Australia, 6005
